response.justification: Maria has strong full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools, with notable contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and open-source tooling, aligning well with the role's technical scope. However, her resume inconsistently uses the name 'Szabo Bogdan' instead of 'Maria Rodriguez,' raising red flags about authenticity or attention to detail, and she lacks explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java — key required stack elements — despite claiming broad language proficiency.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple enterprises
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling development
Strong open-source contributions and DevOps/CI/CD infrastructure experience with Docker and Kubernetes
concerns: Name discrepancy (resume shows Maria Rodriguez but all online profiles use 'Szabo Bogdan')
No explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java — core required technologies
German language skill listed as 'Basic' may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise team
